underlying_goal: Set up and configure a GA4 Analytics App with Neon database, Google OAuth, and get it running locally
friction_detail: Multiple configuration issues with Prisma v7/Neon adapter and NextAuth v5 required repeated debugging attempts, with environment variable loading still unresolved at session end.
brief_summary: User wanted to set up a GA4 Analytics app with Neon database and Google OAuth; got partially working but still encountering server configuration errors at session end.
